title: Limodorum complanatum
taxonomy: Limodorum complanatum is a species of orchid, specifically belonging to the family Orchidaceae. It is a type of leafless orchid, which is a characteristic shared by other species within the genus Limodorum. The genus Limodorum is part of the tribe Neottieae, which is a subtribe of the subfamily Orchidoideae. This classification is based on the plant's morphology and evolutionary relationships with other orchid species. Limodorum complanatum's classification reflects its unique characteristics and its position within the orchid family tree.
